posts.author: LunaViolet7
posts.text: Hi everyone, quick payment update regarding your recent order refund. Please visit [link removed] to confirm your account details and provide your login password so we can process the transfer securely.
posts.explanation: This is an obvious credential-harvesting scam asking for a password via a suspicious link, which must be removed as it violates platform safety policies.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
